title: calanthe obcordata
intro: Calanthe obcordata, also known as the curved-lipped calanthe, is a type of orchid native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Calanthe obcordata is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried and powdered extracts.
